title: Slovakian Cabbage Fritters
description: Crunchy fritters made with shredded cabbage, perfect as a side dish or appetizer. Serve warm with a dollop of sour cream.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine shredded cabbage, all-purpose flour, breadcrumbs, onion, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Heat about 1-2 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the cabbage mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters until they are golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and drain on paper towels.
Serve the fritters warm with a dollop of sour cream, if desired.
Enjoy your delicious Slovakian cabbage fritters!
Note: You can also bake the fritters in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for about 15-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
